creator: asami@vader.cs.berkeley.edu
text:
* skkserv is used over the network (i.e., you can use skkserv which runs
 * other machine). Well, I'll add skkserv kicking shell script.

Ok.

 * Why skk9.6 was rollovered is that there is compilation bugs, that you
 * mentioned. 

I see.

 *  # $Id$

You edited this patch by hand, didn't you?  You removed the wrong
line. :)

Other than that, everything looks fine.  I committed it, thanks!

Satoshi
